chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 34 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.118/2022 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 3. For orders on CMA No.119/2022 (Ex./A) 4. For hearing of main case 5. For orders on CMA No.120/2022 (Stay) 12-01-2022 Petitioner Shafqat Ali, present in person..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgency is granted. 2 to 5. After being confronted as to maintainability of this Petition in view of the fact that the Petitioner is merely holder of an agreement of sale, for which though a Suit for specific performance is pending, but neither the Petitioner nor the seller has been issued the notice, the Petitioner, who is appearing in person, does not press this Petition along with pending applications, and submits that any remedy available under the law would be availed. Order accordingly. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
